legal.retention_notice: We keep customer data for one year only. After one year, data is permanently deleted from active systems and backups according to retention controls.
legal.providers_notice: Core infrastructure and integrations include Supabase, OpenAI, GitHub, Meta Developer Platform, and WhatsApp Business Platform.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: This policy explains how Omnio by Digitivia collects, uses, stores, and protects personal and operational data processed through the platform.
privacy.collect_text: We may process profile data, organization settings, contact details, message content, usage logs, and integration metadata required to operate AI agents and communication channels.
privacy.use_text: Data is used to deliver services, maintain account security, generate analytics, support automations, troubleshoot issues, and comply with applicable legal obligations.
privacy.retention_text: Customer-related data is retained for a maximum of one year, then removed permanently under scheduled deletion policies, unless longer retention is required by law.
privacy.rights_text: You can request data correction or deletion, and ask privacy questions through official support channels listed by your organization administrator.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro_text: These terms govern access to and use of Omnio by Digitivia, including connected channels, dashboards, analytics, and automation features.
terms.accept_text: By using the service, you agree to these terms and confirm that you have authority to act on behalf of your organization.
terms.use_text: You must use the platform lawfully, avoid abusive or harmful content, and follow channel-provider requirements and local regulations.
terms.account_text: You are responsible for account credentials, workspace access, connected integrations, and activity performed by authorized users.
terms.liability_text: The service is provided on a commercially reasonable basis. We continuously improve reliability but cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability in all cases.
terms.changes_text: We may update these terms when features, legal requirements, or provider rules change. Continued use after updates indicates acceptance.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro_text: This policy explains how cookies and similar technologies are used to keep the platform secure, functional, and measurable.
cookies.what_text: Cookies are small browser files used to remember preferences, maintain sessions, and improve user experience across visits.
cookies.types_text: We use essential cookies for authentication and security, preference cookies for language/theme settings, and performance cookies for usage insights.
cookies.manage_text: You can manage cookie settings through your browser. Disabling essential cookies may affect login, session continuity, and core platform features.
cookies.third_party_text: Integrated providers may set technical cookies required for connected services and security controls under their own published policies.

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.intro_text: Omnio by Digitivia applies layered security controls to protect data confidentiality, integrity, and service availability.
security.controls_text: We enforce role-based access, audit logging, credential safeguards, and monitoring to detect unauthorized actions and service anomalies.
security.encryption_text: Data is protected in transit and at rest through provider-supported encryption controls and secure operational practices.
security.incidents_text: Security events are triaged, investigated, and remediated using incident-response procedures with documented corrective actions.
security.compliance_text: Our controls are aligned with industry best practices and contractual commitments, including data minimization, retention limits, and access accountability.
security.disclosure_text: If you identify a potential vulnerability, report it through official support channels for coordinated validation and remediation.

docs.title: Documentation & User Guide
docs.sec_start_text: Welcome to Omnio by Digitivia! This platform allows you to create, manage, and monitor powerful AI agents across multiple communication channels.
docs.section_roles_text: The System Prompt is the brain of your agent. It defines who the agent is, what it knows, and how it speaks.
docs.list_role: Role: Define the persona (e.g., Support Agent, Sales Rep).
docs.list_tone: Tone: Adjectives that describe the personality (e.g., Professional, Friendly, Helpful).
docs.list_kb: Knowledge Base Links: Add URLs that your agent should use as a reference to answer questions accurately.
docs.tip: Pro Tip: Be specific in your System Prompt. Instead of 'You are a helpful assistant,' try 'You are an expert real estate consultant for Acme Realty, specializing in downtown apartments.'
docs.section_channels_text: To start receiving messages, you need to connect your social channels:
docs.list_channel_step1: Go to the specific agent tab in the left sidebar.
docs.list_channel_step3: Follow the integration steps (currently requires a consultation for setup).
docs.list_inbox: AI Inbox: Monitor real-time conversations between your agents and consumers.
docs.list_leads: Sales Leads: Automatically captures contact details and interests from conversations.
docs.list_insights: Live Insights: View performance metrics, message volume, and engagement statistics.
docs.cta_text: If you're stuck or need a custom implementation, our team is here to help.

whatsapp_connect.modal_subtitle: Connect your WhatsApp Business account using Meta Embedded Signup. This flow will let you connect a WABA and phone number to your Digitivia WhatsApp Agent. On success, your WhatsApp connection details will appear below.
whatsapp_connect.helper_line_1: Use this popup flow to authorize your Meta Business assets and connect them to the WhatsApp Agent tab.
whatsapp_connect.helper_line_2: Saved connection details stay in this modal and can be reopened later from Settings.
whatsapp_connect.connection_summary_body_partial: Meta Embedded Signup finished and Digitivia saved the returned WhatsApp business assets. Additional backend completion steps are still pending.
whatsapp_connect.connection_summary_body_connected: Meta Embedded Signup finished and Digitivia saved the returned WhatsApp business assets. The WhatsApp channel is fully configured and ready for use inside Digitivia.
whatsapp_connect.connection_summary_body_disconnected: Start Meta Embedded Signup to connect WhatsApp business assets to the WhatsApp Agent.
whatsapp_connect.connection_summary_body_in_progress: Meta onboarding is in progress. Digitivia is waiting for the WhatsApp business assets returned by Meta.
whatsapp_connect.connection_summary_body_error: Meta onboarding returned data, but Digitivia could not complete the final connection step.
whatsapp_connect.business_assets_subtitle: Digitivia saved these core WhatsApp business assets from Meta onboarding.
whatsapp_connect.how_it_helps_body: This connection lets Digitivia use the customer's WhatsApp Business assets returned by Meta to configure the WhatsApp Agent, identify the connected number, and prepare the channel for inbox, AI, lead capture, and messaging workflows.
whatsapp_connect.connected_number_subtitle: This section shows the WhatsApp business number details Digitivia can currently identify from the Meta onboarding result.
whatsapp_connect.preview_status_fetched: Fetched in browser for demo preview
whatsapp_connect.preview_demo_note: This demo previews the connected WhatsApp number details directly in the browser session.
whatsapp_connect.timeline_empty: No activity yet. Open the flow to start capturing events.
whatsapp_connect.hero_subtitle_connected: Meta onboarding and backend channel setup completed successfully.
whatsapp_connect.hero_subtitle_partial: Meta onboarding completed. Final backend connection steps are still pending.
whatsapp_connect.hero_subtitle_in_progress: The Meta popup flow is active. Digitivia is waiting for the Embedded Signup result from Meta.
whatsapp_connect.hero_subtitle_disconnected: Connect your WhatsApp Business account using Meta Embedded Signup and capture the returned Meta business assets in Digitivia.
whatsapp_connect.hero_subtitle_cancelled: The Meta popup was closed before onboarding finished.
whatsapp_connect.hero_subtitle_error: Meta onboarding returned data, but Digitivia could not complete the final connection step.
whatsapp_connect.hero_summary_connected: The WhatsApp channel is ready for use inside Digitivia.
whatsapp_connect.hero_summary_partial: The channel is ready for follow-up WhatsApp configuration steps.
whatsapp_connect.hero_summary_in_progress: Returned business assets will appear here as soon as Meta completes onboarding.
whatsapp_connect.hero_summary_disconnected: Start the Meta popup flow to connect a WABA, phone number, and related business assets to the WhatsApp Agent.
whatsapp_connect.hero_summary_error: Review the readiness checklist and connection data below to see which finalization steps still need attention.
whatsapp_connect.checklist_backend_hint: These steps require backend exchange and follow-up API calls after Embedded Signup.
whatsapp_connect.checklist_backend_requires_api: Requires backend API completion after Embedded Signup.
whatsapp_connect.checklist_secure_server_note: This secure server-side step is not completed in the browser demo.
whatsapp_connect.checklist_webhook_demo_note: Webhook activation is completed in secure server setup.
whatsapp_connect.advanced_assets_empty: No extra Meta business assets were returned beyond the core WhatsApp connection fields.
whatsapp_connect.cancel_message: Embedded Signup was cancelled before completion.
whatsapp_connect.toast_onboarding_complete: WhatsApp onboarding completed. Final setup steps are still pending.
whatsapp_connect.toast_save_error: Could not save WhatsApp connection state.
whatsapp_connect.log_session_info_received: Session info received from Meta popup.
whatsapp_connect.log_phone_details_fetched: Human-readable phone details were fetched after onboarding.
whatsapp_connect.log_app_subscription_succeeded: App subscription to the WhatsApp Business Account was confirmed.
whatsapp_connect.log_backend_failed: Backend handoff failed, but the Meta connection remained successful.
whatsapp_connect.log_session_demo_restored: Browser demo preview state restored from this session.
whatsapp_connect.log_cleared: Saved connection state cleared for testing.
